content.title: 超市 (chāoshì) – supermarket
content.body:
The word **超市** (chāoshì) is short for **超级市场** (chāojí shìchǎng) and means "supermarket." **超** (chāo) means "super/exceed" and **市** (shì) is short for "market."

超市 is measured with **家** (jiā): **一家超市** (yì jiā chāoshì, "one supermarket").

Example sentences:
- 我去超市。(Wǒ qù chāoshì.) – I'm going

content.title: Object possession and location patterns
content.body:
You can combine object nouns with possession (有), location (在), and demonstrative patterns:

**Possession pattern:**
- 我有一本书。(Wǒ yǒu yì běn shū.) – I have a book.
- 他有手机吗？(Tā yǒu shǒujī ma?) – Does he have a phone?

**Location pattern:**
- 书在桌子上。(Shū zài zhuōzi shàng.) – The book is on the table.
-

content.title: 医院 (yīyuàn) – hospital
content.body:
The word **医院** (yīyuàn) means "hospital." It combines **医** (yī, "medical/doctor") and **院** (yuàn, "institution/courtyard").

医院 is measured with **家** (jiā) or **所** (suǒ): **一家医院** (yì jiā yīyuàn, "one hospital").

Example sentences:
- 他在医院。(Tā zài yīyuàn.) – He is at the hospital.
- 医院在哪儿？(Yīyu

content.title: Comprehensive place-based narrative
content.body:
A complete narrative integrating all place vocabulary:

**NOTE: This narrative includes vocabulary beyond HSK 1 level (marked with †):**

**今天我很忙†。早上我在家喝茶、吃饭。然后†我去学校学习。中午我和朋友†去饭馆吃饭。下午我去超市买水和茶。我也†去商店买书。晚上我不舒服†，去医院看医生†。现在我在家，很累†。**

(Jīntiān wǒ hěn máng. Zǎoshang wǒ zài jiā hē chá, chī fàn. Ránhòu wǒ

content.title: 手机 (shǒujī) – mobile phone
content.body:
The word **手机** (shǒujī) means "mobile phone" or "cell phone." It combines **手** (shǒu, "hand") and **机** (jī, "machine").

手机 is measured with the counter **部** (bù), so "one phone" is **一部手机** (yí bù shǒujī). In HSK 1 contexts, **个** (gè) is also commonly used and acceptable, though 部 is more form

content.title: Describing a room scene
content.body:
Combining object vocabulary with location words allows you to describe room scenes:

**桌子上有一台电脑和三本书。椅子在桌子前面。我的手机在哪儿？在椅子上。**

(Zhuōzi shàng yǒu yì tái diànnǎo hé sān běn shū. Yǐzi zài zhuōzi qiánmian. Wǒ de shǒujī zài nǎr? Zài yǐzi shàng.)

Translation: "There is a computer and three books on the tab

content.title: Shopping and services scenario
content.body:
This scenario integrates objects and places in a practical context:

**A: 你去哪儿？**
**B: 我去超市。我想买一瓶水和一杯茶。你呢？**
**A: 我去商店。我想买一本书。**
**B: 你的手机在哪儿？**
**A: 在家里的桌子上。**

Translation:
A: Where are you going?
B: I'm going to the supermarket. I want to buy a bottle of water and a cup of tea. How about you?
A:

content.title: 家 (jiā) – home, family
content.body:
The word **家** (jiā) means "home" or "family." It is used both as a place and to refer to one's household.

Example sentences:
- 我在家。(Wǒ zài jiā.) – I'm at home.
- 你家在哪儿？(Nǐ jiā zài nǎr?) – Where is your home?
- 我爱我家。(Wǒ ài wǒ jiā.) – I love my family/home.

content.title: Places and directional contexts
content.body:
家 (jiā), 学校 (xuéxiào), 医院 (yīyuàn), 商店 (shāngdiàn), 饭馆 (fànguǎn), and 超市 (chāoshì) are commonly used with location and direction words:

**With 在 (zài, "at/in"):**
- 我在家。(Wǒ zài jiā.) – I'm at home.
- 他在学校。(Tā zài xuéxiào.) – He is at school.
- 她在医院。(Tā zài yīyuàn.) – She is at the hospital.

**With

content.title: 饭 (fàn) – cooked rice, meal
content.body:
The word **饭** (fàn) means "cooked rice" or "meal." It appears in many food-related expressions.

饭 is measured with **碗** (wǎn, "bowl") when referring to rice: **一碗饭** (yì wǎn fàn, "one bowl of rice").

Example sentences:
- 我吃饭。(Wǒ chī fàn.) – I eat a meal / I eat rice.
- 你的饭在这儿。(Nǐ de fàn zài zhèr

content.title: 茶 (chá) – tea
content.body:
The word **茶** (chá) means "tea." It is a fundamental part of Chinese culture.

Like water, tea uses **杯** (bēi) for cups: **一杯茶** (yì bēi chá, "one cup of tea").

Example sentences:
- 你喝茶吗？(Nǐ hē chá ma?) – Do you drink tea?
- 我想喝茶。(Wǒ xiǎng hē chá.) – I want to drink tea.

content.title: 书 (shū) – book
content.body:
The word **书** (shū) means "book." It is one of the most common nouns in Mandarin.

书 is measured with the counter **本** (běn), so "one book" is **一本书** (yì běn shū).

Example sentences:
- 这是我的书。(Zhè shì wǒ de shū.) – This is my book.
- 他有三本书。(Tā yǒu sān běn shū.) – He has three books.

content.title: 电脑 (diànnǎo) – computer
content.body:
The word **电脑** (diànnǎo) means "computer." Literally, it combines **电** (diàn, "electricity") and **脑** (nǎo, "brain").

电脑 is measured with the counter **台** (tái), so "one computer" is **一台电脑** (yì tái diànnǎo).

Example sentences:
- 我有一台电脑。(Wǒ yǒu yì tái diànnǎo.) – I have a computer.
- 这是你的电脑吗？

content.title: Complete measure word system for HSK 1 objects
content.body:
Here is a comprehensive overview of measure words for the objects in this unit:

| Object | Measure Word | Example |
|--------|--------------|---------|
| 书 (book) | 本 (běn) | 一本书 |
| 电脑 (computer) | 台 (tái) | 一台电脑 |
| 手机 (phone) | 部 (bù) | 一部手机 |
| 水 (water) | 杯/瓶 (bēi/píng) | 一杯水 |
| 茶 (tea) | 杯 (

content.title: Drinks and meals vocabulary in context
content.body:
水 (shuǐ), 茶 (chá), and 饭 (fàn) frequently appear with action verbs:

**With 喝 (hē, "drink"):**
- 我喝水。(Wǒ hē shuǐ.) – I drink water.
- 你想喝茶吗？(Nǐ xiǎng hē chá ma?) – Do you want to drink tea?

**With 吃 (chī, "eat"):**
- 我们吃饭。(Wǒmen chī fàn.) – We eat a meal.
- 他在饭馆吃饭。(Tā zài fànguǎn chī fàn.) – He eat

content.title: 水 (shuǐ) – water
content.body:
The word **水** (shuǐ) means "water." It is an essential everyday vocabulary item.

When counting glasses or bottles of water, use **杯** (bēi, "cup/glass") or **瓶** (píng, "bottle"): **一杯水** (yì bēi shuǐ, "one glass of water").

Example sentences:
- 我喝水。(Wǒ hē shuǐ.) – I drink water.
- 这里有水吗？(Zhèlǐ y

content.title: 学校 (xuéxiào) – school
content.body:
The word **学校** (xuéxiào) means "school." It combines **学** (xué, "study/learn") and **校** (xiào, "school").

学校 is measured with **所** (suǒ): **一所学校** (yì suǒ xuéxiào, "one school").

Example sentences:
- 我在学校。(Wǒ zài xuéxiào.) – I'm at school.
- 那是我的学校。(Nà shì wǒ de xuéxiào.) – That is my school.

content.title: 饭馆 (fànguǎn) – restaurant
content.body:
The word **饭馆** (fànguǎn) means "restaurant." It combines **饭** (fàn, "meal") and **馆** (guǎn, "establishment/館").

饭馆 is measured with **家** (jiā): **一家饭馆** (yì jiā fànguǎn, "one restaurant").

Example sentences:
- 我在饭馆吃饭。(Wǒ zài fànguǎn chī fàn.) – I eat at a restaurant.
- 这是一家中国饭馆。(Zhè shì yì jiā

content.title: 桌子 (zhuōzi) – table, desk
content.body:
The word **桌子** (zhuōzi) means "table" or "desk." Like 椅子, it has the **子** (zi) neutral tone suffix.

桌子 is measured with **张** (zhāng): **一张桌子** (yì zhāng zhuōzi, "one table").

Example sentences:
- 桌子上有书。(Zhuōzi shàng yǒu shū.) – There are books on the table.
- 这是你的桌子。(Zhè shì nǐ de zhuōzi.) – Th

content.title: 椅子 (yǐzi) – chair
content.body:
The word **椅子** (yǐzi) means "chair." Note that **子** (zi) is a neutral tone suffix.

椅子 is measured with **把** (bǎ): **一把椅子** (yì bǎ yǐzi, "one chair").

Example sentences:
- 这是我的椅子。(Zhè shì wǒ de yǐzi.) – This is my chair.
- 那儿有五把椅子。(Nàr yǒu wǔ bǎ yǐzi.) – There are five chairs there.

content.title: Daily routine and places
content.body:
You can describe daily routines using place vocabulary:

**我早上在家喝茶。上午我去学校。中午我在饭馆吃饭。下午我去超市。晚上我在家看书。**

(Wǒ zǎoshang zài jiā hē chá. Shàngwǔ wǒ qù xuéxiào. Zhōngwǔ wǒ zài fànguǎn chī fàn. Xiàwǔ wǒ qù chāoshì. Wǎnshang wǒ zài jiā kàn shū.)

Translation: "In the early morning I drink tea at home. In the

content.title: Technology and furniture in daily contexts
content.body:
电脑 (diànnǎo), 手机 (shǒujī), 椅子 (yǐzi), and 桌子 (zhuōzi) appear in everyday descriptions:

**Describing belongings:**
- 这是我的电脑。(Zhè shì wǒ de diànnǎo.) – This is my computer.
- 那是他的手机。(Nà shì tā de shǒujī.) – That is his phone.

**Describing locations:**
- 电脑在桌子上。(Diànnǎo zài zhuōzi shàng.) – The compu

content.title: 商店 (shāngdiàn) – store, shop
content.body:
The word **商店** (shāngdiàn) means "store" or "shop." It combines **商** (shāng, "commerce") and **店** (diàn, "shop").

商店 is measured with **家** (jiā): **一家商店** (yì jiā shāngdiàn, "one store").

Example sentences:
- 那是一家商店。(Nà shì yì jiā shāngdiàn.) – That is a store.
- 商店里有什么？(Shāngdiàn lǐ yǒu shénm

content.title: Object-location complex descriptions
content.body:
Advanced descriptions combine multiple objects with precise location information:

**我的家里有很多东西。客厅里有一张桌子和四把椅子。桌子上有一台电脑、两本书和一杯水。我的手机在椅子上。**

(Wǒ de jiā lǐ yǒu hěn duō dōngxi. Kètīng lǐ yǒu yì zhāng zhuōzi hé sì bǎ yǐzi. Zhuōzi shàng yǒu yì tái diànnǎo, liǎng běn shū hé yì bēi shuǐ. Wǒ de shǒujī zài yǐ
